items.q: How much does mattress rental cost in Jogja?
items.a: Starting from Rp25,000/day for a single foam mattress. Complete package (mattress + sheet + pillow) from Rp35,000/day.
Yes! Order before 3:00 PM WIB and the mattress arrives the same day for Jogja, Sleman, and Bantul areas.
It's easy — choose your mattress, fill the order form, and make payment. Our team will deliver the mattress to your location.
Yes, every mattress is washed and sterilized before delivery. We also provide clean sheets and new pillows for every customer.
Our active service areas: Sleman, Bantul, Jogja City, and Kulonprogo. Areas near Godean get free delivery!

items.q: What is the minimum rental period?
items.a: Minimum rental is 1 day. You can rent daily, weekly, or monthly.

faq_items.q: How much does mattress rental cost in Jogja?
faq_items.a: Our mattress rental prices start from Rp25,000/day for a single foam mattress only (Single Standard 90x200). For a complete package (mattress + bedsheet + pillow) it starts from Rp35,000/day.

faq_items.q: Is there a discount for renting multiple units?
faq_items.a: Yes! Rent 3-5 units and get a 10% discount. Rent 6+ units and get a 15% discount. Great for events, boarding houses, or accommodations.
Yes! FREE delivery within a 3 km radius from our store in Godean. For other areas, delivery fees start from Rp15,000.

faq_items.q: What is the minimum rental period?
faq_items.a: Minimum rental is 1 day. Daily rental is perfect for sudden guests or short events.

faq_items.q: Does the price include delivery and pickup?
faq_items.a: The mattress price does not include delivery fees. However, for the Godean area (3 km radius), delivery is FREE!
